prompt: Exporta las unidades a un ebook HTML interactivo con navegacion lateral, modo oscuro y secciones colapsables.
expected_behavior: Collects all units from units/ directory
Generates self-contained HTML5 file with inline CSS and JS
Includes sticky sidebar TOC with smooth scroll
Adds DZ-ref badges as clickable elements

prompt: Genera el ebook HTML pero incluye los scores de comprensibilidad como badges en cada seccion.
expected_behavior: Reads validation report from reports/ directory
Generates HTML ebook with score badges on each section header

prompt: The book has 25 units — export it to HTML handling the size limit.
expected_behavior: Generates index.html with links to individual unit files
Each unit file is self-contained with navigation back to index
Shared CSS via inline styles in each file
Reports total size and number of files generated
